steps.title: Focus on figure placement
steps.content: The task asks for a sentence emphasizing where the figures are located in Lost in the Shuffle. The relevant note says the painting shows two young men in the bottom left and upper right corners of the canvas.

steps.title: Reject unrelated details
steps.content: A emphasizes mood. C emphasizes the painting's size. D emphasizes water color in Marshall's paintings. The remaining choice directly states the two locations within the canvas. The answer is B.
